title: Floating Cube
description: A  block which can be directly placed in the air
body:
This lightweight mod adds a cube that can be placed in the air to help players who want to build sky buildings. Now instead of struggling to build through-the-sky pillars from the ground, you can literally just place floating cubes in the air.

The floating cubes require the use of phantom membrane, of course you can adjust it yourself with mods such as kubejs.

The placement logic of the floating cubes is slightly different from the regular blocks, so it may allows for some fantastic operations [icon:exp]
